text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 58 

CLM_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Claim Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: The type of claim that was submitted. There are different claim types for each major category of 
health care provider. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): All files – every base/revenue/line/trailer 

VALUES: 4011 = Hospital
